name: Vellirikkai Thogayal
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the cucumber and cut it in half lengthwise.
2. Scoop out the seeds from each half.
3. Cut the cucumber into narrow strips, then further cut these into tiny pieces as for kachumbar.
4. Heat sesame oil in a pan over medium heat.
5. Add black mustard seeds to the hot oil and allow them to stop spluttering.
6. Add Urad dal and fenugreek; fry until they turn brown.
7. Remove the fried spices with a slotted spoon and transfer to a blender.
8. In the same pan, add the remaining ingredients (tampon paste, dried red chillies, hing, and salt).
9. Stir fry the cucumber pieces for two minutes.
10. Pour the contents of the blender into the pan with the cucumber and stir until everything is coarsely ground and well blended.
11. Mix all the ingredients thoroughly in a bowl.
Shyamala Parameswaran
